codeReview.summary: The refactor cleanly splits runtime adapter, migration bootstrap, and seed ownership into dedicated db modules while preserving the existing db/client seam for callers. The diff keeps startup/runtime call sites compatible, preserves the targeted migration journal workaround, and adds focused regression coverage for initialization composition and idempotent seeding.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit b02aa240f5501ddfa351f643262c14e75f3a6c85. I found no high-confidence correctness, compatibility, or shared-state issues in the db seam extraction; the implementation matches the feature scope and preserves stable interfaces for runtime and job initialization.
